---
title: "Session 10 teaching notes: Python 7"
session_id: session-10
event_id: null
---

## Session 10 — Loop control, functions, and dictionaries

p.116: nr 2 homework.

additional exercise (Insurance) - PR shares it

Functions
- mind. eine Klausuraufgabe

p. 121/122
Order, in-session: 4, 5, 1, 6 (if time permits)
Homework: 2-3

Dictionaries: less relevant for the exam (do not explicitly announce as not relevant at the beginning) - maybe as multiple-choice.


Cover loop termination, functions, and dictionaries, while retaining the planned exercise order and exam guidance.

## Exercises

| Page(s) | Exercise                     | Summary                                                                                                                                        | Files                                                                                                        | In-class / take-home |
| ------: | ---------------------------- | ---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- | ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------ | -------------------- |
|     116 | Loop termination             | Stop an otherwise infinite loop when zero is entered and add up to three attempts to the dice game.                                            | `StopLoop.py`<br>`Dicegame3.py`                                                                              |                      |
| 121–122 | Functions                    | Create functions for digit counting, list multiplication, Harshad numbers, factorials, combinations, and a multistage slot-machine simulation. | `CountDigits.py`<br>`Listmult.py`<br>`Harshad.py`<br>`Factorial.py`<br>`Combinations.py`<br>`SlotMachine.py` |                      |
|     133 | Dictionaries and persistence | Maintain a nested dictionary of friends, modify its contents, and save and reload it from a file.                                              | `Friends.py`<br>`friends.db`                                                                                 |                      |

## Page 116 — Loop termination

::: {.teaching-file}
[In-class exercise]{.teaching-label .teaching-label-exercise} [`../materials/session_10/StopLoop.py`](../materials/session_10/StopLoop.py){.teaching-button .teaching-button-exercise}
:::

```{python}
#| echo: true
#| eval: false
{{< include ../materials/session_10/StopLoop.py >}}
```

::: {.teaching-file}
[In-class exercise]{.teaching-label .teaching-label-exercise} [`../materials/session_10/dicegame3.py`](../materials/session_10/dicegame3.py){.teaching-button .teaching-button-exercise}
:::

```{python}
#| echo: true
#| eval: false
{{< include ../materials/session_10/dicegame3.py >}}
```

- Assign exercise 2 as homework.

::: {.callout-note title="Additional exercise TODO"}
An additional insurance exercise is shared by PR. TODO: Add its mapping when the material is available.
:::

## Pages 121–122 — Functions

::: {.teaching-file}
[In-class exercise]{.teaching-label .teaching-label-exercise} [`../materials/session_10/CountDigits.py`](../materials/session_10/CountDigits.py){.teaching-button .teaching-button-exercise}
:::

```{python}
#| echo: true
#| eval: false
{{< include ../materials/session_10/CountDigits.py >}}
```

::: {.teaching-file}
[In-class exercise]{.teaching-label .teaching-label-exercise} [`../materials/session_10/Listmult.py`](../materials/session_10/Listmult.py){.teaching-button .teaching-button-exercise}
:::

```{python}
#| echo: true
#| eval: false
{{< include ../materials/session_10/Listmult.py >}}
```

::: {.teaching-file}
[In-class exercise]{.teaching-label .teaching-label-exercise} [`../materials/session_10/Harshad.py`](../materials/session_10/Harshad.py){.teaching-button .teaching-button-exercise}
:::

```{python}
#| echo: true
#| eval: false
{{< include ../materials/session_10/Harshad.py >}}
```

::: {.teaching-file}
[In-class exercise]{.teaching-label .teaching-label-exercise} [`../materials/session_10/Factorial.py`](../materials/session_10/Factorial.py){.teaching-button .teaching-button-exercise}
:::

```{python}
#| echo: true
#| eval: false
{{< include ../materials/session_10/Factorial.py >}}
```

::: {.teaching-file}
[In-class exercise]{.teaching-label .teaching-label-exercise} [`../materials/session_10/Combinations.py`](../materials/session_10/Combinations.py){.teaching-button .teaching-button-exercise}
:::

```{python}
#| echo: true
#| eval: false
{{< include ../materials/session_10/Combinations.py >}}
```

::: {.teaching-file}
[In-class exercise]{.teaching-label .teaching-label-exercise} [`../materials/session_10/SlotMachine.py`](../materials/session_10/SlotMachine.py){.teaching-button .teaching-button-exercise}
:::

```{python}
#| echo: true
#| eval: false
{{< include ../materials/session_10/SlotMachine.py >}}
```

- Complete exercises in this order: 4, 5, 1, then 6 if time permits.
- Assign exercises 2–3 as homework.

::: {.callout-important title="Exam relevance"}
At least one exam exercise will cover functions.
:::

::: {.teaching-break}
☕ Break — 10 minutes
:::

## Page 133 — Dictionaries and persistence

::: {.teaching-file}
[In-class exercise]{.teaching-label .teaching-label-exercise} [`../materials/session_10/Friends.py`](../materials/session_10/Friends.py){.teaching-button .teaching-button-exercise}
:::

```{python}
#| echo: true
#| eval: false
{{< include ../materials/session_10/Friends.py >}}
```

- Dictionaries are less relevant to the exam; do not announce this explicitly at the beginning. They may appear in a multiple-choice question.

::: {.callout-note title="Generated file"}
`friends.db` is preserved in the exercise table, but it is not supplied as input material. `Friends.py` generates it at runtime.
:::

## Summary and announcements

- TODO

::: {.callout-tip title="Notes for improvement"}
Take notes on improvements and common questions during the session and add them to `feedback.qmd` afterwards.
:::
